title: hieracium villosum subsp. eurybasis
intro: Hieracium villosum subsp. eurybasis, also known as the hairy hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hieracium villosum subsp. eurybasis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in homeopathic remedies to support overall well-being.
